supabase.upDownMechanism: Single forward SQL files. No native rollback.
supabase.rlsSyntax: ALTER TABLE <table> ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase.fkSyntax: FOREIGN KEY (<col>) REFERENCES <table>(<col>) ON DELETE <RESTRICT|CASCADE|SET NULL>
supabase.note: PostgreSQL under the hood. RLS is a PG feature.

prisma.upDownMechanism: Forward only. Prisma handles rollback by reverting the schema.prisma file.
prisma.rlsSyntax: Native RLS not in migration.sql directly; declared in schema.prisma via @@policy or raw SQL via prisma.executeRaw.
prisma.fkSyntax: FOREIGN KEY constraints auto-generated from relation() directives in schema.prisma.
prisma.note: Migrations are generated from schema.prisma. RLS requires custom SQL or Prisma's preview @@policy feature.

drizzle.rlsSyntax: Standard PostgreSQL ALTER TABLE ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY in the .sql files.
drizzle.fkSyntax: references() in schema definition generates FK constraints in migration SQL.
drizzle.note: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite supported. RLS is PG-only.

flyway.upDownMechanism: Forward only. Undo requires Flyway Teams (paid) or manual scripts.
flyway.rlsSyntax: Standard PostgreSQL ALTER TABLE ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
flyway.note: Java/JVM ecosystem. Versioned (V) and repeatable (R) migrations.

alembic.upDownMechanism: upgrade() and downgrade() functions in each migration file.
alembic.rlsSyntax: op.execute('ALTER TABLE <table> ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY') in upgrade() function.
alembic.fkSyntax: op.create_foreign_key() or raw SQL in op.execute().
alembic.note: Python/SQLAlchemy. Each .py file has revision ID. Migrations chain via down_revision.

rails.upDownMechanism: self.up and self.down (or change method with auto-reversal).
rails.rlsSyntax: Not native. Requires raw SQL via execute('ALTER TABLE...') or the pg_relational gem.
rails.note: Ruby on Rails. RLS requires custom SQL — flagged but not checked.

django.upDownMechanism: forwards() and backwards() methods in each Migration class.
django.rlsSyntax: Not native. Requires RunSQL migration operation with ALTER TABLE.
django.fkSyntax: migrations.AddField with to= or CreateModel with ForeignKey field.

knex.rlsSyntax: schema.raw('ALTER TABLE <table> ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY').
knex.note: Node.js. RLS via raw SQL only.

golang-migrate.rlsSyntax: Standard PostgreSQL ALTER TABLE ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY in .up.sql.

typeorm.rlsSyntax: queryRunner.query('ALTER TABLE... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY').

goose.upDownMechanism: -- +goose Up / -- +goose Down annotations in SQL files.
goose.rlsSyntax: Standard SQL ALTER TABLE in the +goose Up section.
goose.note: Go. SQL with annotation-based up/down sections.

atlas.upDownMechanism: Declarative schema-first. Atlas computes diff automatically.
atlas.rlsSyntax: Standard SQL in schema definition or migration files.
atlas.note: Go. Schema-as-code. Can generate migrations from HCL or SQL.

node-pg-migrate.rlsSyntax: pgm.exec('ALTER TABLE...') or pgm.alterTable with RLS option.

liquibase.createTable: CREATE TABLE creates a new table.
liquibase.note: Java/JVM. XML/YAML/JSON changelogs. Trellis parses XML changesets for FK declarations only.

defaults.message: No migration tool detected. Migration safety checks are skipped. Add a migration tool directory (e.g., supabase/migrations, prisma/migrations, db/migration) or create custom tooling.
